sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ النِّيَّةُ الصَّادِقَةُ أَسَاسَ قَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ، فَلَا يَنْفَعُ عَمَلٌ ظَاهِرٌ إِذَا كَانَ الْقَلْبُ خَالِيًا مِنَ الْإِخْلَاصِ لِلَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Iskrena namjera smatra se osnovom primanja djela u islamu, jer vanjsko djelo ne koristi ako je srce prazno od iskrenosti prema Uzvišenom Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Sincere intention is considered the foundation for the acceptance of deeds in Islam, as outward actions are of no avail if the heart is void of sincerity towards Allah Almighty.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je nanijetio' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every person shall have only that which he intended' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الْعَمَلَ بِغَيْرِ إِخْلَاصٍ كَالْمُسَافِرِ يَمْلَأُ جِرَابَهُ رَمْلًا يُثْقِلُهُ وَلَا يَنْفَعُهُ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim naglašava da je djelo bez iskrenosti poput putnika koji puni svoju torbu pijeskom; to ga samo opterećuje, a ne koristi mu.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim emphasizes that a deed without sincerity is like a traveler who fills his bag with sand; it burdens him but does not benefit him.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُرَاقِبَ قَلْبَهُ قَبْلَ كُلِّ قَوْلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ لِيَكُونَ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, musliman mora kontrolisati svoje srce prije svakog govora ili postupka kako bi on bio isključivo radi Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a Muslim must monitor his heart before every word or deed to ensure it is purely for the sake of Allah.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَصْحِيحَ النِّيَّةِ هُوَ أَوَّلُ خُطْوَاتِ النَّجَاحِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ispravljanje namjere je prvi korak ka uspjehu na ovom i na budućem svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Correcting one's intention is the first step toward success in this world and the Hereafter.
